title: triticum aestivum var. compactum
intro: Triticum aestivum var. compactum, also known as compact wheat or dwarf wheat, is a variety of wheat plant characterized by its shorter stature and compact growth habit compared to other wheat varieties. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Triticum aestivum var. compactum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve gut health, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
